title: Who are Liable for Illegal Recruitment, Trafficking in Persons, and
content: 60 other Unlawful Acts. The persons criminally liable for acts constituting illegal 61 25 recruitment, trafficking in persons, and other prohibited acts under P.D. No. 442, as 1 renumbered, R.A. No. 8042, as amended by R.A. 10022, R.A. 9208, as amended, and 2 other relevant laws are the principals, accomplices and accessories. In case of juridical 3 persons, the officers having ownership, control, management or direction of their 4 business who are responsible for the commission of the offense and the responsible 5 employees/agents thereof shall be liable. 6 7
